title: PlanReviewVerifyInputsOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_verify_inputs`: the prompt-template `plan` text and the Pass-2 verifier `instructions` (header + per-finding listing) fed into the workflow's verify prompt step (its `with: {plan, instructions}`).

plan.description: The assembled plan text (PlanContext.plan_text) — resolves the verifier prompt's {{plan}}.

instructions.description: The Pass-2 verifier instructions as a LIST of per-chunk per-finding listings (global indices preserved). ONE element in the common case (whole request fits the window); token-budgeted splits only when it would exceed the window. The verify prompt step runs once per element and merges verifications by index.
